findings.evidence: Passing 'chef' as a parameter to control behavior.
Using a boolean primitive 'frequentCustomerDiscount' instead of an object.
Group of fields 'firstName', 'lastName', 'address', 'phoneNumber', 'email' appearing together.
Fields 'tempDiscountCode' and 'tempOrderNote' are only meaningful in some object states.
Method 'takeOrder' calls 'chef.bakePizza' instead of using its own data.
Method 'calmCustomerDown' calls 'chef.cleanKitchen', accessing another class's internals.
Method 'askForReceipt' is unused and serves no current purpose.
Method 'anotherUnusedMethod' is never called.
Method 'yetAnotherUnusedMethod' is never called.
Method 'longMethod' performs multiple tasks in a single method.
Method 'orderWithUnnecessaryDetails' has six parameters.
Method 'duplicateMethod' repeats the same call to 'takeOrder' twice.
Method 'chainOfMethods' calls 'chef.cleanKitchen', indicating a message chain.
Method 'middlemanMethod' delegates to 'middleMethod' without adding behavior.
Method 'accessInternalDetails' accesses 'chef.busy', a private detail of another class.
Multiple methods ('updateName', 'updateAddress', etc.) are required to update contact information.
Methods 'notifyForPromotion', 'notifyForDiscount', and 'notifyForNewArrivals' handle different notification types.
Methods 'applyDiscount' and 'applyLoyaltyPoints' suggest parallel hierarchies.
Method 'handleComplaint' uses an if-else chain to handle different complaint types.
Method 'refusedBequest' is empty and does not use inherited functionality.

Fields `firstName`, `lastName`, `address`, `phoneNumber`, and `email` appear together repeatedly.
Fields `tempDiscountCode` and `tempOrderNote` are only meaningful in some object states.

Method body spans 16 lines and performs multiple unrelated tasks.
Updating contact info requires changes across multiple methods (`updateName`, `updateAddress`, etc.).
Methods `notifyForPromotion`, `notifyForDiscount`, and `notifyForNewArrivals` handle different notification types.
Method uses an `if-else` chain to handle different complaint types.
Method is empty and does not use inherited functionality.

Method accesses internal details of the `pizza` object.

findings.evidence: Field `frequentCustomerDiscount` uses a boolean primitive instead of an object.
Fields `firstName`, `lastName`, `address`, `phoneNumber`, and `email` appear together repeatedly.
Fields `tempDiscountCode` and `tempOrderNote` are only meaningful in some object states.
Long `if-else-if` chain on `pizzaType` to create different pizza objects.
Long `if-else-if` chain on `complaint` to handle different complaints.
Method updates multiple fields, requiring changes in multiple places for contact info updates.
Multiple methods (`notifyForPromotion`, `notifyForDiscount`, `notifyForNewArrivals`, `applyDiscount`, `applyLoyaltyPoints`) handle different notification and discount logic.
Method `askForReceipt` is unused and serves no current purpose.
Method `anotherUnusedMethod` is never called.
Method `yetAnotherUnusedMethod` is never called.
Method calls `this.casher.chef.cleanKitchen()`, forming a chain of method calls.
Method `middlemanMethod` delegates to `middleMethod` without adding behavior.
Method `middleMethod` delegates to `realMethod` without adding behavior.
Method accesses `this.casher.chef.busy`, exposing internal details of another class.
Method body is 19 lines long and performs multiple unrelated tasks.
Method has 5 parameters (`firstName`, `lastName`, `address`, `phoneNumber`, `email`).
